title: SpecDefinition
description: Output of spec-definition. Complete definition of a Spec: a named, documented contract or shared data shape that multiple concepts reference.

description.description: One-paragraph description naming the contract or data shape and why it exists.

shape.description: Type or structural definition. Use whichever notation is clearest (record syntax, BNF, recursive enum, or table of patterns rendered as a string).

concept.description: Name of a Concept that references this Spec.

via.description: Which state component or action of the named Concept references this Spec.

referenced_by.description: Concepts whose state or actions reference this Spec. Must contain at least two entries (Spec test #1).

semantics.description: Labeling conventions, role of each field, intended use, and rules of interpretation that aren't obvious from the shape alone.

invariants.description: Properties the Spec promises to maintain (totality, uniqueness, stability across edits, etc.).
